dataset_name: LapisAI Enterprise Knowledge Assistant Ground Truth - Advanced Split
description: Balanced bilingual advanced Q&A dataset (30 EN, 30 ID) designed to stress-test semantic retrieval, multi-hop reasoning, and strict false-positive rejection. Features diverse query variants for hybrid search evaluation.

evaluation_policy.development_split_usage: Use for debugging, retrieval tuning, threshold selection, and prompt iteration.
evaluation_policy.test_split_usage: Keep fixed and use only for final reported evaluation.
evaluation_policy.answerable_rule: A response is correct only when it is supported by at least one listed reference and includes the essential expected-answer facts.
evaluation_policy.unanswerable_rule: The assistant must state that the information is unavailable and must not invent a value, policy, URL, date, or procedure.

multilingual_retrieval.purpose: Evaluate cross-lingual retrieval from Indonesian user queries to English enterprise documents.

items.question: If an employee has a spouse and four children, will the entire family receive full medical coverage under the corporate policy?
items.expected_answer: No, the company health insurance plan covers the employee and a maximum of three dependents.

references.source_excerpt: Employees and up to 3 dependents are covered by the company health insurance plan.

query_variants: If an employee has a spouse and four children, will the entire family receive full medical coverage under the corporate policy?
Jika seorang karyawan memiliki pasangan dan empat anak, apakah seluruh keluarga akan mendapatkan pertanggungan medis penuh berdasarkan polis perusahaan?
health insurance coverage limit for employee dependents family

items.question: What is the maximum storage limit allowed for an employee's corporate electronic mail?
items.expected_answer: The standard mailbox quota is 50 GB.

references.source_excerpt: The standard mailbox quota is 50 GB.

query_variants: What is the maximum storage limit allowed for an employee's corporate electronic mail?
Berapa batas penyimpanan maksimum yang diizinkan untuk surat elektronik perusahaan milik karyawan?
employee corporate email mailbox quota maximum capacity

items.question: What is the financial penalty for losing your building entry badge?
items.expected_answer: A replacement access card costs IDR 50,000.

references.source_excerpt: Request one at the front desk; a replacement fee of IDR 50,000 applies.

query_variants: What is the financial penalty for losing your building entry badge?
Apa denda finansial jika kehilangan kartu akses masuk gedung perusahaan?
replacement fee lost access card IDR

items.question: If today is the 26th of the month, which portal should staff access to view their latest compensation details?
items.expected_answer: Staff should access the HR portal under My Documents to view their payslips.

references.source_excerpt: Payslips are available in the HR portal under My Documents after the 25th.

query_variants: If today is the 26th of the month, which portal should staff access to view their latest compensation details?
Jika hari ini tanggal 26, portal mana yang harus diakses staf untuk melihat detail kompensasi terbaru mereka?

items.question: If I forget the credentials to log into the internal system, what is the procedure and the maximum time limit for recovery?
items.expected_answer: Raise a ticket to the IT Helpdesk via the portal. Resets are processed within 1x24 hours.

references.source_excerpt: Raise a ticket to the IT Helpdesk via the portal; resets are processed within 1x24 hours.

query_variants: If I forget the credentials to log into the internal system, what is the procedure and the maximum time limit for recovery?
Jika saya lupa kredensial untuk masuk ke sistem internal, prosedur apa yang harus dilakukan dan berapa batas waktu maksimum untuk pemulihannya?
password reset procedure IT helpdesk SLA 1x24 hours

items.question: Dokumen fisik atau identifikasi spesifik apa yang wajib dibawa oleh karyawan baru pada hari orientasi pertama?
items.expected_answer: Karyawan baru harus membawa ID yang valid (KTP), NPWP (Tax ID), dan detail rekening bank.

references.source_excerpt: A valid ID, your tax ID (NPWP), and bank account details.

query_variants: Dokumen fisik atau identifikasi spesifik apa yang wajib dibawa oleh karyawan baru pada hari orientasi pertama?
What specific physical paperwork or identification is required from a fresh hire during orientation day?
syarat dokumen onboarding karyawan baru hari pertama NPWP rekening

items.question: Jika tanggal 25 Desember adalah Hari Raya Natal, pada hari apa karyawan akan menerima upah bulanan mereka?
items.expected_answer: Gaji akan dibayarkan pada hari kerja sebelumnya jika tanggal 25 jatuh pada hari libur.

references.source_excerpt: If the 25th is a holiday, payment is the prior working day.

query_variants: Jika tanggal 25 Desember adalah Hari Raya Natal, pada hari apa karyawan akan menerima upah bulanan mereka?
If the 25th of December is Christmas Day, on what day will employees receive their monthly wages?

items.question: Jika saya membeli meja ergonomis senilai Rp 2.000.000 untuk keperluan WFH, berapa nominal maksimal yang akan diganti perusahaan, dan apakah saya wajib melampirkan nota asli?
items.expected_answer: Perusahaan mengganti maksimal IDR 1.500.000 (tunjangan home-office). Karena nilainya di atas IDR 150.000, Anda wajib melampirkan nota fisik asli.

references.source_excerpt: A one-time home-office allowance of IDR 1,500,000 is available.
Original receipts are required for any single expense above IDR 150,000.

query_variants: Jika saya membeli meja ergonomis senilai Rp 2.000.000 untuk keperluan WFH, berapa nominal maksimal yang akan diganti perusahaan, dan apakah saya wajib melampirkan nota asli?

items.question: Jika ada email masuk yang mendesak dari CEO meminta detail transfer kawat, tetapi alamat pengirimnya terlihat sedikit salah eja, apa yang harus saya lakukan?
items.expected_answer: Jangan mengklik tautan atau membalas; segera laporkan email tersebut menggunakan tombol Report Phishing.

references.source_excerpt: Do not click links; report it using the Report Phishing button.

items.question: If an engineer accidentally leaves a laptop containing unencrypted client records at a coffee shop at 2:00 PM, what is the absolute latest time they can notify the company, and how?
items.expected_answer: The breach must be reported by 3:00 PM (within 1 hour) to security@nusantaradynamics.co.id.

references.source_excerpt: Suspected data breaches must be reported to security@nusantaradynamics.co.id within 1 hour.

items.question: Jika menjelang akhir tahun saya masih memiliki jatah cuti 10 hari yang belum terpakai, berapa hari yang akan hangus?
items.expected_answer: Hanya maksimal 6 hari yang bisa dibawa ke tahun depan, sehingga 4 hari cuti Anda akan hangus.

items.question: Jika saya membuat kredensial akun sepanjang 10 karakter, mengandung angka, huruf besar, dan simbol, apakah itu sudah mematuhi standar keamanan perusahaan?
items.expected_answer: Tidak. Kata sandi harus minimal 12 karakter, menyertakan huruf besar, huruf kecil, angka, dan simbol, serta diganti setiap 90 hari.

references.source_excerpt: Passwords must be at least 12 characters and include upper case, lower case, a number, and a symbol. Rotation Passwords must be changed every 90 days.

items.question: Jika seorang desainer bekerja secara remote di luar kantor dan jadwalnya jatuh pada libur nasional, apakah ia tetap diwajibkan online di aplikasi tim pada jam 14.00 WIB?

items.question: If a user has not logged into the CMS since January 1st, will their profile still be active on May 1st, and how often is their entitlement audited?

items.question: Am I permitted to claim a team lunch expense of IDR 120,000 using only a digital photo of the receipt sent via WhatsApp?

items.question: If an automated testing suite reports 75% execution against the codebase, will the CI/CD pipeline allow the branch integration?
items.expected_answer: No. A minimum of 80% unit-test coverage is required to merge.

items.question: Berapa lama maksimal layanan backend boleh lumpuh total sebelum melanggar target RTO, dan berapa SLA bulanan untuk ketersediaan API kita?

items.question: Jika sebuah layanan mikro melakukan 120 panggilan dalam 60 detik menggunakan token otentikasi yang dibuat dua jam lalu, dua kesalahan keamanan spesifik apa yang akan ditimbulkan?
items.expected_answer: Panggilan gagal karena dua hal: token sudah kedaluwarsa (berlaku hanya 60 menit) dan melanggar batas nilai (*rate limit*) yaitu maksimal 100 permintaan per menit.

references.source_excerpt: Tokens expire after 60 minutes. Rate Limit The default rate limit is 100 requests per minute per client.

items.question: Sistem orkestrasi kontainer apa yang mengelola beban kerja kita, dan *engine* teknologi apa yang digunakan untuk penyimpanan persisten (database) vs tembolok memori sementara?
